content.text:
The track ahead shows a clear right-hand curve beginning, with the dashed center line curving to the right and the car well-centered on the straight portion transitioning into the curve.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 20, target index = (20+5) % 121 = 25
- Target WP25: x=6.7749, y=0.8413
- Car: x=5.9273, y=0.6677, heading=-1.2704°
- dy = 0.8413 - 0.6677 = 0.1736, dx = 6.7749 - 5.9273 = 0.8476
- bearing = atan2(0.1736, 0.8476) = 11.578°
- delta = 11.578 - (-1.2704) = +12.848° → slight left correction

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.381m, distance_from_center = 0.0157m
- edge_distance ≈ 0.365m → well clear on both sides

Delta ~12.8° → |delta| 5-15°, speed=1.5, steering_angle=5

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead but WP25 shows delta of ~+13° (left), so apply gentle left steering at full speed to follow the waypoint line into the curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight along y≈0.683 before curving right around x=6.3-7.3.",
    "Big right curve begins around WP22-30 (x~6.3-7.2, y increases from 0.7 to 1.4).",
    "After the right curve, track loops back along y≈2.77 heading left.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "Use steering_angle=0 on straights to avoid oscillation.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves.",
    "Car heading is ~-1.27° (nearly due east), nearly perfectly centered.",
    "Right curve starts significantly around WP24-30; prepare to steer right when delta goes negative.",
    "No objects on track detected.",
    "Boundary safety check: edge_distance ~0.365m, well clear on both sides."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.6056, 5.7554, 5.8160, 5.9273],
    "y": [0.6843, 0.6843, 0.6700, 0.6677],
    "heading": [-1.171, -1.216, -1.209, -1.270]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP25 at (6.775, 0.841): bearing=11.58°, delta=+12.85° → slight left, steer left gently.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 5.0
}
```
